# QRButik

> QRButik is a Swedish B2B SaaS for sports clubs and tournaments: a QR-based kiosk system with Swish checkout for visitors. Clubs pay a monthly license (from 995 SEK/month). Platform billing uses Stripe; customer payments use Swish deep links to the club's own number.

## Target audience

- **Buyer:** Sports club board, treasurer, or office (idrottsförening, cup)
- **Users:** Team leaders running kiosks; treasurer needing consolidated sales and CSV/SIE export
- **Not targeting:** Private individuals running flea markets

## Business model

- Club license: from 995 SEK/month, unlimited kiosks within the organization
- 14-day free trial without card at signup; Stripe Checkout for billing
- Tagline: Digital kiosk för hela föreningen

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://qrbutik.se/): B2B value prop, trial + demo CTAs
- [Solutions by sport](https://qrbutik.se/utforska): Sport-specific landing pages (football, handball, etc.)
- [Contact / demo](https://qrbutik.se/kontakt): Book a demo or start trial
- [Create organization](https://qrbutik.se/skapa): Onboarding with 14-day trial
- [Admin](https://qrbutik.se/admin): Magic-link login; org billing and kiosks

## Customer-facing (no login)

- [Shop menu](https://qrbutik.se/s/{shopSlug}): Public menu and Swish payment
- [Receipt](https://qrbutik.se/tack/{transactionId}): Digital receipt after payment

## Product capabilities (positioning)

- Multiple kiosks under one club license
- Central dashboard for treasurer and board
- CSV and SIE export for Fortnox/Visma
- Organization roles: owner, treasurer, editor

## Documentation for agents

- Roadmap: /ROADMAP.md
- Product vision: /plan.md
- SEO strategy: /SEO_INSTRUCTIONS.md

## SEO note

Sport×city URLs redirect to sport hub pages. Primary SEO surface: homepage + `/utforska/{sport}`.
